title: Add Color Legend Key Below ERD Diagram
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing the ERD, I want a color legend displayed below the diagram that explains what each icon color represents, so that I can quickly understand the meaning of blue, green, and brown colored field icons.
description:
Renders a color legend key on a single line below the ERD diagram that explains the three field icon colors:

- **Blue** — Primary Key
- **Green** — Foreign Key
- **Brown** — External Object Key (previously red)

The legend appears when a node is selected, providing contextual help for understanding the field type color coding in the ERD.
acceptance_criteria: A color legend is displayed below the ERD diagram when a node is selected
The legend renders on a single line and does not overlap the diagram
ux_changes: Color legend key displayed below the ERD diagram showing Blue (Primary Key), Green (Foreign Key), and Brown (External Object Key) with colored box indicators.
implementation_notes: The legend appears contextually when a node is selected, matching the node selection highlighting behavior.
comment_summary: Developer completed quickly and showed screenshot of the legend appearing below the diagram on node selection.
